author: sbein
body:
PR description:
Much HLT functionality is restored for FastSim, which was last fully functional in CMSSW_7_4_2. fixForFastSim was removed in confdb.py in CMSSW_7_4_3. FastSim HLT was slowly dismantled until an explicit cmsDriver ban on --fast and HLT was imposed inCMSSW_8_4_0. Now HLT is deployed as an opt-in for Run 3 analysis: HLT:GRun, and enabled using the customization script:

```
--customise FastSimulation/HighLevelTrigger/customizeFastSimHLT.customizeFastSimHLTGRunReviewDefault
Default FastSim recipes that do not invoke the customization script remain unchanged. The customizer uses existing FastSim or offline-compatible producer substitutions. Some InputTags are re-routed to existing FastSim collections. Several HLT paths are pruned if there are non-FastSim inputs. There are no newly-built collections/DIGIs and no fake/empty collections.
```

FastSim+HLT is run with the above customizer, e.g., as:

```
cmsDriver.py SMS-T1tttt_mGl-1500_mLSP-100_13TeV-pythia8_cfi -s GEN,SIM,RECOBEFMIX,DIGI,L1,DIGI2RAW,HLT:GRun,L1Reco,RECO,PAT,NANO --fast --era Run3_2023_FastSim --beamspot Realistic25ns13p6TeVEarly2023Collision --conditions auto:phase1_2023_realistic --geometry DB:Extended --eventcontent NANOAODSIM,MINIAODSIM --datatier NANOAODSIM,MINIAODSIM -n 1 --fileout file:fastsim_hlt_review_default.root --python_filename fastsim_hlt_review_default.py --customise FastSimulation/HighLevelTrigger/customizeFastSimHLT.customizeFastSimHLTGRunReviewDefault --no_exec
```
This will produce MiniAOD and NanoAOD with TriggerResults and NanoAOD HLT_* branches for a substantial subset of Run 3 paths.

PR validation:
Validation compares HLT:GRun FastSim against a FullSim reference on SMS-T1tttt samples:
https://www.desy.de/~beinsam/FastSim/HltResurrection/HLT_GRun_4000FullSimActiveL1_vs_4000FastSimReviewDefault_20260706/all/index.html
title: Adding FastSim HLT functionality for Run 3
